title: Plump Pork Ukrainian Dumplings
description: Buttery and juicy Ukrainian dish featuring ancho chillies and coconut cream, wrapped in corn husks for a unique and comforting meal.
instructions: Soak the corn husks in water for 30 minutes to make them pliable.
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, ancho chillies, coconut cream, butter, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
To assemble the dumplings, lay a corn husk flat and place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling and then roll the dumpling up, starting from the wide end.
Repeat with the remaining corn husks and filling.
Place the dumplings in a large steamer basket, leaving some space between each dumpling.
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 30 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through and the corn husks are tender.
Serve the dumplings hot, with additional coconut cream and ancho chillies on the side if desired.
